zh.Clifton, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾克里夫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Bexton於1274年出生在英國爾時，她的父親John de Bexton33歲，母親Clementia de Cheadle34歲。她於大約1285年與Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1358年在英國爾奧維 塔波享年84歲。

zh-hans.Clifton, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾克里夫頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Bexton于1274年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲John de Bexton33岁，母亲Clementia de Cheadle34岁。她于大约1285年与Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1358年在英国爾奧維 塔波享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bexton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: variant of Bexon with intrusive -t-.

variants.name: Bexon
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name * Becke ( see Beck (3)) + -son.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Bexton was born in 1274, in Cheshire, England, her father, John de Bexton, was 33 and her mother, Clementia de Cheadle, was 34. She married Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle about 1285. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1358, in Over Tabley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Bexton est née en 1274, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Bexton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Clementia de Cheadle, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle environ 1285. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1358, à Over Tabley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Bexton 1274 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Bexton 33 und ihre Mutter Clementia de Cheadle 34. Sie hat um 1285 Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1358 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Over Tabley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Bexton è nata il nel 1274 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, John de Bexton, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Clementia de Cheadle, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle circa 1285. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1358, nel Over Tabley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Bextonが1274年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Bextonは33歳，母Clementia de Cheadleは34歳であった。約1285年にAdam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1358年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー タブリーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Bexton(이)가 1274년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Bexton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Clementia de Cheadle(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1285년 Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1358년 영국 체실르 버 타블리에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Clifton, Cheshire, England: Clifton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Bexton nasceu em 1274, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Bexton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Clementia de Cheadle, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle aproximadamente 1285. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1358, em Over Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Bexton родилась в 1274 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Bexton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Clementia de Cheadle, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle около 1285 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1358 г. в местности овир табли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Bexton nació en 1274, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Bexton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Clementia de Cheadle, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Adam d'Eiville - Lord of Tabley and Cheadle aproximadamente 1285. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1358, en Over Tabley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
